input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.8.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.8.1
            TITLE: a standalone nonprogrammable circuit must be used to monitor the electronic throttle

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.8.1: A standalone nonprogrammable circuit must be used to monitor the electronic throttle
IC.4.8.1 A standalone nonprogrammable circuit must be used to monitor the electronic throttle 
control.   
The BSPD must be provided in addition to the Throttle Plausibility Checks  IC.4.7
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 83 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: A standalone nonprogrammable circuit must be used to monitor the electronic throttle control. The BSPD must be provided in addition to the Throttle Plausibility Checks IC.4.7
